digest.component_or_area: review-gate calibration (code-review blocking lane, plan-review claim gate, completion-verifier)
propositions: Code review is too loose: zero blocking finding-votes across 162 changes while confirmed must-fix findings passed as advisories below the 0.95 threshold.
Derive and enable a code-review blocking threshold for serious-tier criteria over the code-v2 finding cohort, gated by an ADR-0036 A/B check before flipping.
Agent guidance mandating remediation of all valid plan-review advisories should be loosened to judgment so organic advisory uptake can be measured.
Completion-verifier FAIL verdicts are not durably persisted, ratchet piecemeal, and the signed-children epic AC pattern defeats the certifiable:false escape hatch.
Leaf plans drift from their parent's scope and no plan-review criterion checks leaf-vs-parent containment at claim time, so drift is caught only at epic close.

Field finding: the plan-review claim gate is high-precision and effectively convergent when plans are made factually accurate against the codebase; expensive rounds were driven by agent-side plan inaccuracy, not gate over-tightness.
